ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.

ElementDescription: Sex of subject at birth
Notes: M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: What is the highest level of education you have completed?
Notes: 0=No formal schooling; 1=Less than primary school; 2= Primary school completed ; 3=Secondary/High school completed; 4=College/University completed; 5=Post graduate degree; 6=Refused; 7= Completed Post-Secondary School

ElementDescription: What is your religion?
(Marital Status) Are you:
Notes: 1= Single; 2=Married; 3=Divorced or separated; 4=Regular partner, not live-in; 5= Regular partner, live in; 6=Widowed

How many children do you have?
Notes: Number of Children; 99= Refuse to answer

During the last week, how many different sex partners have you had?

How often do you have a drink containing alcohol?
Notes: 0 = Never; 1 = Monthly or less; 2 = 2 to 4 times a month; 3 = 2 to 3 times a week; 4 = 4 or more times a week; 5 = I prefer not to answer

ElementDescription: How many drinks containing alcohol do you have on a typical day you are drinking?
Notes: 0 = 1 or 2; 1 = 3 or 4; 2 = 5 or 6; 3 = 7 to 9; 4 = 10 or more; 5= I prefer not to answer

ElementDescription: How often do you have six or more drinks on one occasion?
Notes: 0= Never; 1= Less than monthly; 2= Monthly; 3= Weekly; 4= Daily or almost daily; 9999= Do not know; -997 = Missing; -998 = Not collected at this time point; -999 = Not applicable

ElementDescription: How often have you found that you were not able to stop drinking once you had started?
Notes: 0=Never; 1=Less than monthly; 2=Monthly; 3=Weekly; 4=Daily or almost daily; 5 = I prefer not to answer

ElementDescription: How often have you failed to do what was expected of you because of drinking?
Notes: 0=Never; 1=Less than monthly; 2=Monthly; 3=Weekly; 4=Daily or almost daily; 5 = I prefer not to answer

ElementDescription: How often have you been unable to remember what happened the night before because you had been drinking?
Notes: 0=Never; 1=Less than monthly; 2=Monthly; 3=Weekly; 4=Daily or almost daily; 5 = I prefer not to answer

ElementDescription: Will you read the text messages on your own or have someone help you?
Do you have a private phone or do you share with others?
